handled.resolution: Item 10 now groups as the [OUTLET] component (derived from its outlet flange scope), no longer a text-named line.
The two Outlet lines now merge into one [OUTLET]. Paid inquiry 361-26-2440 supersedes the no-charge STD base wording, so the current flange_type is UNPUNCHED with no false PUNCHED conflict.
[DOOR LOCATION] now an attribute: Access Door lines get component=ACCESS DOOR with door_location=<clock> (e.g. 9:00) lifted from the 'Door Location: @9:00' detail.

[HANDLE LOCATION] now captures the actual clock value on item 6 as handle_location=3:00. The same IVC retains handle_location_standard=NO and handle_location_reference=DISCHARGE separately, without a false conflict.
The IVC wording is retained as handle_location_reference=DISCHARGE with handle_location_standard=NO; the separate item 6 clock detail supplies handle_location=3:00.
Item 9 now component=MECHANICAL RUN TEST.
Item 13 now component=SHRINK WRAP with shrink_wrap_range='21" to 36-1/2"'.
Item 16 now component=SHIP WITH with referenced_po=23971.

Item 18 (Run Test) merges with item 9 under one [MECHANICAL RUN TEST]. testing_standard=YES and testing_required=YES are separate compatible attributes, so there is no false STANDARD-versus-REQUIRED conflict.
Confirmed: item 6 captures fail_power=Will Advise and fail_signal=Will Advise. Split label/value lines are understood together and no longer produce a false review row.
Item 11 -> component=PERCENT WIDTH with pct_width_customer=85% AND pct_width_rounded=85% (rounds to nearest 5%; e.g. 83->85, 82->80 — same rounded value = same construction).
The repeated Rep Ref text is no longer attached to item 7. The actual Sales Order Mark cell is stored verbatim under [MARK] as mark_text, with its full related wording retained as rep_reference.
The repeated page-header fragment is no longer item detail. The actual [SHIP TO] table cell is captured with company, address lines, country, and shipping instruction in separate attributes.
[MARK] now preserves the actual mark_text and full related rep_reference verbatim; the wrapped continuation-page fragments are removed from item 7.
